recommendations.title: Double Trouble
recommendations.overview: A stuntman and a saxophonist stand in for two billionaires threatened by killers.

recommendations.title: Trinity Is Still My Name
recommendations.overview: The two brothers Trinity and Bambino are exchanged by two federal agents and take advantage of the situation to steal a huge booty hidden in a monastery by a gang of outlaws.

recommendations.title: Even Angels Eat Beans
recommendations.overview: Two mismatched buddies are mistaken for mob enforcers in Depression-era America.

recommendations.title: They Call Me Trinity
recommendations.overview: The simple story has the pair coming to the rescue of peace-loving Mormons when land-hungry Major Harriman sends his bullies to harass them into giving up their fertile valley. Trinity and Bambino manage to save the Mormons and send the bad guys pack

recommendations.title: Crime Busters
recommendations.overview: An attempted robbery turns to be an unexpected recruitment when two unemployed men mistakenly break into a police office instead of a store.

recommendations.title: Man of the East

recommendations.title: Go for It
recommendations.overview: After Doug picks up hitchhiking Rosco with his truck, they are mistaken for two bank robbers by the traffic police. They manage to escape  only to be confused for two secret agents while trying to take a flight at the airport.

recommendations.title: Return of the Jedi

recommendations.title: The Cowboy Way
recommendations.genres: Action, Comedy, Crime, Drama, Thriller, Western
recommendations.overview: Two championship rodeo partners travel to New York to find their missing friend, Nacho Salazar who went missing there.

recommendations.title: Jesus
recommendations.overview: Three and a half years of Jesus' ministry, as told in the Gospel of Luke.
